# Design State — Memory Backup
*Backed up: 2026-05-12. Auto-generated by Claude. Do not edit manually.*

This folder is a backup of the Claude project memory for TacticalMelee, captured so it
survives a machine reboot and is tracked by git. On next session, memory in
`C:\Users\Arcan\.claude\projects\D--PROJECTS-ClaudeCode\memory\` is authoritative.

## Files in this backup
- `MEMORY-INDEX.md` — this file
- `project-tacticalmelee.md` — Version0.1 baseline + BattleEngine architecture
- `project-tacticalmelee-agenda.md` — current design frontier (5 areas)
- `project-tmcrittermaker.md` — critter YAML design, CritterRegistry/CMR split, factory pipeline
- `feedback-timestamps.md` — start every TacticalMelee reply with [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM]
